hero.title2: already have a filmmaker inside them
hero.subtitle: You love drawing. You love clicking photos. That means you already see the world differently — like an artist, like a storyteller. This site is your friendly guide to turn those superpowers into beautiful films, reels, and even a career — all from your phone. 💜
hero.quote: "I built this site because I believe YOUR unique eye — the way you see light, color, emotions — is something no AI can ever replace. Let's turn that gift into something extraordinary."

whyMatters.title: You Already Have the Artist's Eye 🎨
whyMatters.p1: When you draw, you make choices — which line to darken, which color to use, what to leave empty. When you take a photo, you decide the angle, the light, the moment.
whyMatters.p2: These are the exact same skills filmmakers use! You're already practicing visual storytelling without knowing it.
whyMatters.p3: This site helps you connect the dots: your drawings + your photos + a few simple techniques = your first film.
whyMatters.tryTodayText: Take 3 photos of the same object — one from above, one from below, one at eye level. See how each angle tells a different story? That's cinematography! You just did it.

aiVsHuman.title: AI is Your Helper, Not Your Replacement
humanItems: Your unique way of seeing the world
aiVsHuman.bottom: You + AI = Films with soul AND speed. Your creativity leads, AI assists. Together, magic happens! ✨

journey.title: How a Film Gets Made — Your Roadmap
journey.subtitle: Every movie, reel, or short follows these 3 stages. Think of it like cooking: first you plan the menu (Pre), then you cook (Production), then you plate and serve (Post)!

pre.title: Pre-Production
pre.desc: This is where you turn your ideas into a clear plan — like making a party list so everything is perfect!

steps.label: Think of Your Idea
steps.desc: What story do you want to tell? Maybe a day-in-my-life, your art process, or a short story from your imagination.

steps.label: Write a Simple Script
steps.desc: Just 3–5 sentences about what happens. Beginning → Middle → End. That's it!

steps.label: Draw a Storyboard
steps.desc: Use YOUR drawing skills! Sketch 4–8 small boxes showing what each shot looks like. Stick figures are totally fine.

steps.label: Plan Your Shots
steps.desc: Walk around with your phone camera. Find good spots with nice light. Note when sunlight is best.

pre.tryToday: 🎯 Try This Right Now: Pick one idea. Draw 4 boxes on paper. Sketch what happens in each. Congrats — you just made a real storyboard!

prod.title: Production
prod.desc: This is where your plans come alive! You grab your phone and start shooting. Your drawings and photos become moving images.

steps.label: Use Your Phone Camera
steps.desc: No expensive gear needed! Modern phones shoot beautiful video. Clean the lens first!

steps.label: Find Good Light
steps.desc: Natural light near a window is gorgeous. Golden hour (sunrise/sunset) makes everything magical.

steps.label: Capture Your Art Process
steps.desc: Film yourself drawing! Time-lapse of an artwork being created = instant engaging content.

steps.label: Mix Drawings + Real Life
steps.desc: Hold your drawing up against a real background. Animate between photos. This is YOUR unique style!

prod.tryToday: 🎯 Try This Right Now: Prop your phone against something stable. Film a 30-second time-lapse of yourself drawing. You just created content!

post.title: Post-Production
post.desc: This is where the magic happens! You take all your clips, arrange them, add music, and create your final film. AI tools make this faster than ever.

steps.label: Import Clips to an Editor
steps.desc: CapCut (free!) is perfect for beginners. Just drag in your videos.

steps.label: Cut & Arrange
steps.desc: Remove boring parts. Keep the interesting stuff. Put clips in the right order.

steps.label: Add Music & Effects
steps.desc: CapCut has tons of free music. Add text overlays, transitions, and filters.

steps.label: Export & Share!
steps.desc: Export in 1080p. Post to Instagram Reels or YouTube Shorts. Your first film is DONE! 🎉

post.tryToday: 🎯 Try This Right Now: Open CapCut. Import that drawing time-lapse you just filmed. Add a trending song. Export. Share it. You're officially a filmmaker now! 🎬

history.title: From Cave Walls to Your Phone Screen
history.subtitle: Humans have ALWAYS told stories with pictures. You are part of an ancient, beautiful tradition!

items.title: Cave Paintings
items.desc: The first drawings! Humans told stories on cave walls. Just like you draw — same human instinct.

items.title: First Photograph
items.desc: The first photo was captured. A new way to freeze moments in time — like you do with your camera.

items.title: Cinema is Born
items.desc: The Lumière brothers showed moving pictures. Photos that come alive — exactly what you'll learn!

items.title: Silent Film Art
items.desc: Filmmakers told powerful stories with NO dialogue — just visuals, light, and emotion. Pure visual storytelling.

items.title: YouTube Revolution
items.desc: Anyone with a camera could share their stories with the world. The creator revolution begins!

items.title: AI + Phone Era
items.desc: Your phone + AI tools + your creativity = professional-level filmmaking. YOUR era!

career.title: Earn, Create & Be Free — From Your Phone
career.subtitle: Real talk: Girls from small towns and big cities are building creative careers from their phones. Here's your honest roadmap.

advantage.title: Your Unique Advantage
advantage.text: You already draw and take photos — this is HUGE! Most creators start from zero. You already have an artist's eye, a visual sense, and creative hands. AI gives speed, but YOU bring the soul and emotion that makes content stand out. That's your superpower.

beginner.title: Beginner: First 0–6 Months
tasks: Share your art process, photo edits, behind-the-scenes
Use trending sounds + your unique visual style
Nano creator collaborations: ₹500–10,000 per branded post

growing.title: Growing: 6–18 Months
tasks: Brand deals with local and national brands
Freelance video editing and Reels creation
UGC (User Generated Content) gigs — brands pay you to create content
Start a YouTube channel with longer-form content

independent.title: Independent Creator: 18+ Months
tasks: Multiple income streams: brand deals + freelance + YouTube monetization
Your own style and audience — brands come to YOU
Teach others through courses or mentoring
Complete creative freedom and time independence

milestones.title: Your First 90 Days — Step by Step

day1.label: Day 1
day1.text: Download CapCut and Canva. Film your first 30-second art time-lapse. Post it.

week1.label: Week 1
week1.text: Post 3 Reels showing your art or photography. Experiment with angles and lighting.

month1.label: Month 1
month1.text: 15+ Reels posted. Try one 'storytelling' Reel with beginning-middle-end structure.

month3.label: Month 3
month3.text: 50+ Reels. Growing audience. Reach out to 2 small brands for your first collaboration.

items.name: Instagram Reels
items.desc: Fastest start. Huge audience in India.

items.name: Fiverr / Instagram DM
items.desc: Offer video editing services. Start freelancing.

items.name: CapCut
items.desc: Best free video editor with AI features (auto-captions, effects, templates)

items.name: Canva
items.desc: Design thumbnails, stories, and posts. Free plan is very powerful.

items.name: Google Photos
items.desc: Free cloud storage + basic photo editing + magic eraser

items.name: ChatGPT / Gemini
items.desc: Help with ideas, captions, scripts, hashtag research

career.honesty: Honest note: Building an audience takes 90+ days of consistent posting. It's not instant. But with AI tools + your art skills, you can grow much faster than starting from scratch. Stay consistent — results will come!
career.motivation: You can control your own time. Work from home. Earn from your passion. Be free and independent. Start small today — this site (and I) am with you every step! ❤️

domains.coreDesc: The foundation. Everything else is execution of story.
domains.storyCardDesc: Story leads. Style serves. If you skip this, everything below becomes beautiful nonsense. The multiplier formula:
domains.execDesc: Each domain has its own question. Master these to make your films stand out.
domains.designQ: "If this never moved, would it still work?"
domains.designDesc: Composition, color, typography — how to make any single frame look beautiful.
domains.cinDesc: Light, camera angles, lens choices — the visual language of film.
domains.soundQ: "Would this feel real with eyes closed?"
domains.soundDesc: Music, sound effects, silence — the invisible half of filmmaking.
domains.editDesc: How cuts, rhythm, and pacing create emotion and meaning.
domains.motionDesc: Animation, movement, and the physics that make visuals feel real.

advancedDesc: Structured grammars for emotion, scenes, and AI-native visual thinking.
toolsDesc: Hands-on tools, curated references, and personal craft notes.

paths.label: Getting Started
paths.title: Choose Your Path
paths.desc: Pick the journey that matches where you are right now.
paths.creativeSubtitle: "I draw or take photos, want to do video"

footer.tagline: Your guide to creative filmmaking in the AI era.
